description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named c-plus-plus-examples that runs on push and pull request events for any branch and paths matching c*-*/**. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs, cmake and make, each with a matrix strategy to build and test C++ code in different folders. The cmake job installs dependencies, then uses cmake and ninja to build the code, while the make job installs additional dependencies including Crystal, then uses make to build the code.
